relative_path: Data & Figures/Data/1. t-CycIF/4_4 - PRITTI cohort experiment/4_4 analysis files/3.Alvas_MSc/Presentations/different_radiuses_spatial_analysis.pptx
full_text:
Spatial count and LDA; using radiuses of 13, 25 and 35 microns

Title

Phenotypic Profiling of Spatial Tumor Microenvironment Architecture in Highly Multiplexed Images of High-Grade Serous Ovarian Carcinoma

Parameters and pixel size (QuPath)

For both spatial count and LDA:
13 microns = 40px
25 microns = 77px
35 microns = 108px
FOXP3+ CD4+ T cells and CD4+ T cells combined

LDA:
number of latent motifs = 10

Count of neighboring cells for each radius

% of 0 neighboring cells:

13 microns: 295 175 = 4,6%
25 microns: 23 517 = 0,36%
35 microns: 7 932 = 0,12%

% of 0-4 neighboring cells:

13 microns: 3 887 794 = 60%
25 microns: 325 040 = 5%
35 microns: 85 240 = 1,3%

Spatial count - KMeans clustering, elbow curve

13 microns 25 microns 35 microns

Spatial count, radius 40px 13 microns

0: CD8+ T cells
1: Tumor-stromal interface
2: Stroma, not infiltrated
3: CD163+ DC
4: CD163- Macrophages
5: Endothelial
6: Tumor, no infiltration
7: B cell dominated
8: DC
9: Stroma, immune infiltrated

Spatial count, radius 77px 25 microns

0: Endothelial
1: Tumor border
2: Stroma, not infiltrated
3: Stroma, immune infiltrated
4: DC
5: Tumor, no infiltration
6: CD8+ T cells
7: CD163+ DC
8: B cells (dominated), TLS
9: Tumor-Stromal Interface

Spatial count, radius 108px 35 microns

0: TSI????
1: Stroma, not infiltrated
2: CD163+ DC
3: Tumor, no infiltration
4: Tumor border
5: Immune compartment
6: Tumor-stromal interface
7: DC
8: B cell dominated / TLS
9: Stroma, immune infiltrated

LDA - KMeans clustering, elbow curve

13 microns 25 microns 35 microns

LDA, radius 40px 13 microns

0: Stroma, immune infiltrated
1: Tumor, no infiltration
2: Tumor-stromal interface
3: CD4+ T cells
4: DC
5: Stroma, not infiltrated
6: B cell dominated
7: Endothelial
8: CD8+ T cells
9: CD163+ DC

LDA, radius 77px 25 microns

0: DC
1: Tumor border
2: Stroma
3: Endothelial
4: Tumor, no infiltration
5: CD163+ DC
6: Immune compartment
7: CD8+ T cells
8: B cell dominated
9: Tumor-stromal interface

LDA, radius 108px 35 microns

0: Stroma, not infiltrated
1: TSI: immune excluded
2: CD8+ T cells
3: Tumor border
4: DC
5: Tumor, no infiltration
6: TSI: immune enriched
7: Stroma, immune infiltrated
8: follows Iba1 but not only, in the borders of other immune RCNs, to some extent also endothelial
9: B cell dominated
